subject: fix(portfolio): display app names instead of repo names on landing page
body:
Card titles now show human-readable app names from meta.json (e.g.
"Visual Design Tool" instead of "canva-grid") so non-technical visitors
see meaningful names at a glance.

Tags: ui, ux, portfolio
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: portfolio
